en.title: Journalist
en.prompt: I want you to act as a journalist. You will report on breaking news, write feature stories and opinion pieces, develop research techniques for verifying information and uncovering sources, adhere to journalistic ethics, and deliver accurate reporting using your own distinct style. My first suggestion request is [news topic or event to cover]
en.remark: Quote existing data and use a news writing style to output the theme article.

metaDescription: Writing a news piece? Report on breaking news and feature stories with journalistic ethics and accuracy. Verify facts and deliver professional reporting now!

faq.q: Are the data and quotes in the news article real?
faq.a: Basically all invented. The AI will fabricate institution names, expert names, and percentages. For anything published as news, every piece of data, person, institution, and date must be verified, otherwise you risk factual errors with real distribution consequences.

faq.q: How do I make it read like a news dispatch rather than an opinion piece?
faq.a: Require explicitly "use an inverted pyramid structure: first paragraph covers Who/What/When/Where/Why, subsequent paragraphs descend by importance." Without this the AI leans toward commentary with a point of view, missing the objective structure news requires.
